Off Calendar Nov-08-2005 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Minor's Compromise hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Judge Gerald Ragan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Ron Sinclair.
Nancy Williams, Esq. for Petitioner: Linda Sepulveda, present as Guardian at litem for: Kelsey Sepulveda, a minor Claimant, was sworn and examined.
On the basis of evidence received, the Petition is granted and compromise is approved.
Attorney's Fees $2,797.41
Costs $392.12
A net balance of $8,392.22 to be deposited into a blocked account with Wells Fargo Bank, 65 N. Winchester Blvd., San ta Clara, CA., no withdrawals shall be made without a written court order or until the minor reaches the age of 18 years.
Order Approving Compromise of Claim and Order to Deposit Money Into Blocked Account signed in open court.
